headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Top 10 pick predictions off free agency
description: How has NFL free agency affected 2026 draft plans? Here are Field Yates' updated predictions for picks Nos. 1-10 after the first wave of deals.

headline: Ravens, Eagles, Steelers each awarded 4 compensatory picks
description: Baltimore, Philadelphia and Pittsburgh each were awarded a league-high four compensatory picks in next month's NFL draft based on their losses and signings in last year's free agency.
